texto: Enough of this guilt," he told her, his voice reduced to a cracked whisper. "What's done is done.

texto: Now, I pray you, cast yourself into a different world, a different trail of thought; step into a place where dragons live and breathe, where they are as real in touch and voice as you or I. Where they face the same extinction every day that they have suffered in our world: the extinction of myth . . . yet where they battle every moment to fend off such a fate for another day . . .

frase_original: Now, I pray you, cast yourself into a different world, a different trail of thought; step into a place where dragons live and breathe, where they are as real in touch and voice as you or I. Where they face the same extinction every day that they have suffered in our world: the extinction of myth . . . yet where they battle every moment to fend off such a fate for another day . . .

texto: For this, for you, my heart will burnIt whispers to me, what I speak now in turn:If the sun should hide, let it hide;If darkness drain the light, on moonbeams we ride.It matters not,For I am by your side.If the sky should fall, let it fall;If Death open his wings, ignore his dark call;Let the stars fade, let worlds collide;Let the seas boil, let chaos hold back the tide.It matters not,For you are by my side.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Alexis Steinhauer sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “For this, for you, my heart will burnIt whispers to me, what I speak now in turn:If the sun shoul…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, heart, sky, útil em momentos de luto e dia-chuvoso.
